diagrams.title: Binary Tree for Traversal Practice
diagrams.description: Sample tree to practice all traversal types with 7 nodes
diagrams.purpose: Use this tree to verify traversal outputs: Preorder=1,2,4,5,3,6,7 | Inorder=4,2,5,1,6,3,7 | Postorder=4,5,2,6,7,3,1 | Level-order=1,2,3,4,5,6,7

diagrams.title: Traversal Order Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows the conceptual path through tree for each traversal method
elements: Three paths showing order of visiting nodes
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how each traversal method moves through the tree, making it easier to understand the recursive flow

diagrams.title: Stack and Queue Usage
diagrams.description: Shows memory structures used in different traversals
diagrams.purpose: Understand why different data structures are needed and how memory is managed during traversals
